reason: TM misreads package references as variables (red) / import paths as strings (green); namespace yellow is the correct meaning and matches ODP's namespace color
consts are yellow by design (matches TS variable.readonly / ODP variable.other.constant); the Go TM grammar cannot see constness
const locals are yellow by design; TM only marks some declaration sites
One Dark Pro upstream itself defines semantic enumMember cyan; TM has no enum-member awareness
